title: RoboMME: Benchmarking and Understanding Memory for Robotic Generalist Policies

details.title: RoboMME: Benchmarking and Understanding Memory for Robotic Generalist Policies
details.abstract: TL;DR: RoboMME is a new benchmark for memory-augmented robotic manipulation, evaluating how well models remember, reason, and act across temporal, spatial, object, and procedural memory.

title: FlashPrefill: Instantaneous Pattern Discovery and Thresholding for Ultra-Fast Long-Context Prefilling

details.title: FlashPrefill: Instantaneous Pattern Discovery and Thresholding for Ultra-Fast Long-Context Prefilling

title: PixARMesh: Autoregressive Mesh-Native Single-View Scene Reconstruction

details.title: PixARMesh: Autoregressive Mesh-Native Single-View Scene Reconstruction
details.abstract: PixARMesh is a mesh-native autoregressive framework for single-view 3D scene reconstruction. Instead of reconstructing via intermediate volumetric or implicit representations, PixARMesh directly models instances with native mesh representation. Object poses and meshes are predicted in a unified autoregressive sequence.

title: Reasoning Models Struggle to Control their Chains of Thought

details.title: Reasoning Models Struggle to Control their Chains of Thought
details.abstract: This work introduces CoT-Control to measure whether reasoning models can suppress or manipulate their chain-of-thought, finding limited controllability, modestly improving with size and inhibited by RL, prompts, and compute.
